title: README links to old godocs
body: The [README.md](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/0443a77799bcfe8f028e51e959ae9916f6dfe090/image/README.md)'s godoc reference button link out to the old package path https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/containers/image/v5 instead of https://pkg.go.dev/go.podman.io/image/v5 which has newer versions.

comments.body: Posted a [PR for this](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/436). Not sure what to do with the cirrusci button next to it. Is it still used (my quick url change to it 404'ed but maybe I typoed)?
